song.title: Alas and did my Savior bleed
song.author: Isaac Watts
song.presentation: v1 c v2 c v3 c v4 c v5 c
song.lyrics:
[v1] . D Alas, and did my Savior bleed? . G D G D A And did my Sovereign die? . D Would He devote that sacred head . Em A D For such a worm as I.
[C] . D At the cross, at the cross where . A I first saw the light, . A7 And the burden of my heart . D—G—D Rolled away, . G D It was there by faith I received . Bm My sight, . G A D And now I am happy all the day!
[v2] Was it for sins that I had done He groaned upon the tree? Amazing pity! Grace unknown! And love beyond degree!
[v3] Well might the sun in darkness hide, And shut His glories in, When Christ, the mighty Maker, died For man, His creature's sin.
[v4] Thus might I hide my blushing face While His dear cross appears. Dissolve my heart in thankfulness, And melt mine eyes to tears.
[v5] But drops of grief can ne'er repay The debt of love I owe; Here, Lord, I give myself away, 'Tis all that I can do.
